languages.text: Керампесок будет очищен и перемолот в сухую пыль, которая послужит прекрасной основной для вязкого строительного раствора и огнеупорной керамитной брони.

traits.locale_text: Керампесок будет очищен и перемолот в сухую пыль, которая послужит прекрасной основной для вязкого строительного раствора и огнеупорной керамитной брони.

languages.text: The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.
languages.original_text: Керампесок будет очищен и перемолот в сухую пыль, которая послужит прекрасной основной для вязкого строительного раствора и огнеупорной керамитной брони.

traits.locale_text: The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.
The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.
The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.
The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.

languages.text: Der Keramiksand wird gereinigt und zu einem trockenen Staub gemahlen, der als hervorragende Grundlage für zähflüssigen Mörtel und hitzebeständige Keramikpanzer dient.
languages.original_text: The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.

traits.locale_text: Der Keramiksand wird gereinigt und zu einem trockenen Staub gemahlen, der als hervorragende Grundlage für zähflüssigen Mörtel und hitzebeständige Keramikpanzer dient.

languages.text: Le ceramsand sera nettoyé et broyé en une poussière sèche qui servira d'excellente base pour un mortier visqueux et une armure en ceramite résistante à la chaleur.
languages.original_text: The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.

traits.locale_text: Le ceramsand sera nettoyé et broyé en une poussière sèche qui servira d'excellente base pour un mortier visqueux et une armure en ceramite résistante à la chaleur.

languages.text: La ceramita se limpiará y molerá hasta obtener un polvo seco que servirá de excelente base para el mortero viscoso y la armadura de ceramita resistente al calor.
languages.original_text: The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.

traits.locale_text: La ceramita se limpiará y molerá hasta obtener un polvo seco que servirá de excelente base para el mortero viscoso y la armadura de ceramita resistente al calor.

languages.text: Seramit temizlenecek ve kuru bir toz haline getirilecek, bu da viskoz harç ve ısıya dayanıklı seramit zırh için mükemmel bir temel görevi görecektir.
languages.original_text: The ceramsand will be cleaned and ground into a dry dust that will serve as an excellent base for viscous mortar and heat-resistant ceramite armour.

traits.locale_text: Seramit temizlenecek ve kuru bir toz haline getirilecek, bu da viskoz harç ve ısıya dayanıklı seramit zırh için mükemmel bir temel görevi görecektir.
